authority_model.MACHINE_VERIFIED: Deterministic hard gate; non-zero exit blocks merge.
authority_model.MACHINE_ASSISTED: Machine-checked hygiene model that improves review quality but is not correctness proof alone.
authority_model.HUMAN_REVIEW_ONLY: Human constitutional judgment; cannot be fully automated.

failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_MANIFEST_DRIFT: Repository tree drifts from MANIFEST hashes.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_GATE_ID_DRIFT: Gate IDs drift from canonical contract.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_ENTRYPOINT_BREAKAGE: Core tool entrypoints no longer invoke.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_EXTERNAL_LINK_BREAKAGE: External reachability indicates broken public references.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_PAGES_SURFACE_BREAKAGE: Published HTML surface is structurally broken.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_ARTIFACT_PROVENANCE_DRIFT: CI evidence artifacts lack canonical names/checksums/provenance.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_DOCTRINE_DRIFT: Governance doctrine drifts from policy constraints.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_POLICY_DOC_DRIFT: Checklist/docs diverge from canonical governance contract.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_GOVERNANCE_REGRESSION: Validator behavior drifts without regression guardrails.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_DEPENDENCY_HERMETICITY: Dependency policy is non-deterministic or lockfile drifts.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_UNDECLARED_DEPENDENCY: Governance tools import undeclared hidden dependencies.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_CLI_CONTRACT_DRIFT: Governance-critical CLI entrypoints drift from expected contract.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_REQUIRED_CHECK_MAPPING_DRIFT: Required-check to workflow-job mapping drifts from canonical immutable contract.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_GITHUB_SETTINGS_BASELINE_DRIFT: Declared external GitHub settings baseline drifts from enforced governance contract.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_POST_MERGE_OPS_DRIFT: Post-merge GitHub operations drift from repository governance assumptions.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_POLICY_DRIFT_REVIEW_MISSING: Policy-drift review section is missing for governance-critical changes.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_WORKFLOW_PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION: Workflow permissions/triggers/escalation surfaces violate trust model.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_MANIFEST_INVENTORY_UNTRUTHFUL: MANIFEST inventory is incomplete, manipulated, or includes forbidden artifacts.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_REPO_MAP_UNTRUTHFUL: repo-map inventory is incomplete, stale, or unauthorized.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_CODEOWNERS_DILUTION: CODEOWNERS rules are diluted by broad later patterns.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_PR_TEMPLATE_WEAKENING: PR template structure/content quality is weakened or placeholder-only.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_LOCAL_BASELINE_DRIFT: Canonical local baseline parity drifts from CI/checklist surfaces.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_GOVERNANCE_ARTIFACT_NONDETERMINISM: Tracked governance artifacts are generated nondeterministically.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_ONE_PR_DOCTRINE_WEAKENING: Auto-generated PR mechanisms or maintenance bots can bypass one-PR doctrine.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_JOB_WEAKENING: Critical CI jobs are silently weakened (strictness, retention, tolerating failures).
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_DOCUMENTATION_UNTRUTHFUL: Governance docs claim enforcement beyond repo-native capability.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_PR_INTAKE_QUALITY: Pull request intake quality is empty/formal for mandatory governance sections.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_EXECUTION_CHAIN_VERIFICATION_DRIFT: Independent execution-chain recomputation no longer matches emitted chain claims.
failure_mode_vocabulary.FM_GIT_AUTHORITY_EXECUTION_DRIFT: Execution verification paths allow non-authoritative Git state or fallback.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Manifest integrity verification command exits successfully.
what_is_not_verified: Does not prove semantic quality.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Valid canonical artifact fixture is accepted.
what_is_not_verified: Does not validate production payload diversity.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Invalid canonical artifact fixture is rejected.
what_is_not_verified: Does not validate production payload diversity.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Valid evaluation-result fixture is accepted.
what_is_not_verified: Does not validate production payload diversity.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Invalid evaluation-result fixture is rejected.
what_is_not_verified: Does not validate production payload diversity.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: requirements.txt uses deterministic pinning and governance lockfile remains synchronized with declared/used dependencies.
what_is_not_verified: Does not provide full transitive lock reproducibility across all operating systems.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Representative canonical hash inputs remain stable across repeated runs and edge-case negatives pass.
what_is_not_verified: Does not prove artifact semantic correctness.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Worked example semantic invariants pass and repeat-run consistency is stable.
what_is_not_verified: Does not cover all adversarial scenarios.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: No-evidence mutation fails with strict fail-closed assertions.
what_is_not_verified: Does not prove all semantic edge cases.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Canonical gate IDs remain unchanged.
what_is_not_verified: Does not verify full score decomposition.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Benchmark metrics satisfy demo-only status plus honesty thresholds/docs alignment, and regenerated benchmark outputs match committed tracked outputs.
what_is_not_verified: Does not imply production representativeness.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Benchmark outputs (metrics, case-level CSV, per-case evaluations) and canonical gate fixture jointly enforce assurance-depth anti-overclaim policy under deterministic checks.
what_is_not_verified: Does not imply production representativeness.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Governance-critical tools expose stable CLI help/JSON contracts and deterministic unit/integration tests for pcos compile/run/verify/replay/bench surfaces execute in CI.
what_is_not_verified: Does not validate all runtime states.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: compileall succeeds for tools, benchmark, and pcos modules.
what_is_not_verified: Does not prove algorithmic correctness.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Internal links and anchors resolve correctly.
what_is_not_verified: Does not measure external URL uptime.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: External link audit runs in CI as non-blocking evidence and reports reachable failures without affecting deterministic required merge gates.
what_is_not_verified: External network uptime is non-deterministic and not a required merge gate.
Does not provide repository-native proof for third-party availability.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Publication pages satisfy structural metadata/imports/asset coverage checks.
what_is_not_verified: Does not substitute UX/content quality review.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: CI evidence artifacts include checksum manifest entries classified as required/optional/diagnostic; required entries (including run.status and core outputs) must verify with canonical names, producer provenance, non-empty size, checksums, and deterministic path normalization against artifact download roots.
what_is_not_verified: Does not prove artifact semantic truthfulness by itself.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Governance validator confirms one-PR doctrine controls.
what_is_not_verified: Does not configure remote repository settings.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Validator enforces registry/workflow/checklist/pre-commit alignment.
what_is_not_verified: Does not replace constitutional human review.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Governance validator tests pass for success and failure modes.
what_is_not_verified: Does not replace direct code review of validator changes.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Canonical required-check mapping file is synchronized with immutable workflow job IDs and reviewer-facing names.
what_is_not_verified: Does not configure remote repository settings.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Machine-readable external GitHub settings baseline exists and required status checks match canonical required-check mapping.
what_is_not_verified: Does not enforce GitHub settings directly from repository files.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: PR template and contributing policy mandate explicit policy-drift review for governance-critical surfaces.
what_is_not_verified: Does not replace constitutional human review.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Workflow forbids dangerous triggers/permissions/escalation surfaces and enforces strictness for critical jobs.
what_is_not_verified: Does not enforce GitHub-hosted runner internals.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: MANIFEST and repo-map inventories are symmetric with tracked tree and governance surfaces, with denylisted artifacts blocked.
what_is_not_verified: Does not prove semantic quality of non-governance content.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: CODEOWNERS does not contain broad late rules that dilute governance-critical ownership patterns.
what_is_not_verified: Does not enforce reviewer staffing availability.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: PR template preserves canonical section ordering and minimum non-placeholder instruction quality.
what_is_not_verified: Does not validate final human-authored PR narrative quality.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Canonical local baseline command/script remains synchronized with checklist and CI parity surfaces.
what_is_not_verified: Does not execute external GitHub settings operations.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Generated governance artifacts are deterministic under repeated generation checks.
what_is_not_verified: Does not guarantee determinism for non-governance artifacts.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Repository forbids common automated PR generators that weaken one-PR governance doctrine.
what_is_not_verified: Does not control third-party organization-level automations outside repository settings.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Governance docs must not claim repo-native enforcement for controls known to be external-only.
what_is_not_verified: Does not replace constitutional human review.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Canonical local baseline script verifies checklist command contract and supports executable baseline mode.
what_is_not_verified: Does not execute external GitHub settings operations.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: On pull_request events, mandatory PR sections Human review required and Policy-drift review contain non-formal non-empty content.
what_is_not_verified: Does not replace constitutional human review.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Execution-state chain is independently recomputed from canonical input and emitted replay capsules without trusting emitted hashes.
what_is_not_verified: Does not provide external hardware attestation.

invariants.minimum_evidence_requirement: Execution verification paths hard-fail on non-authoritative Git state for critical execution/governance surfaces.
what_is_not_verified: Does not attest external compute environment provenance.
